epics.title: Epic 4: Save & Reuse Favorite Roads
epics.theme: Users can save road segments as favorites and have them influence route planning
acceptance_criteria: User can long-press route segment to save as favorite
User can view saved favorites in Settings with mini map previews
User can enable 'Include favorite roads' toggle when planning
Generated routes show which favorites influenced the route
User receives feedback when favorite is too far to include
human_test_steps: Long-press a route segment and save it as a favorite
View saved favorites in Settings with mini map previews
Enable 'Include favorite roads' toggle when planning a route
See indicators showing which favorites influenced the route
Receive feedback when a favorite is too far to include
epics.human_review_deliverable: Users can save their favorite road segments and have them actively influence route planning with clear visual feedback

tasks.title: Add favorite_roads table to Convex schema

specification.objective: Add favorite_roads table with proper schema for storing user's favorite road segments
specification.success_state: Table exists with proper fields, indexes, and migration runs successfully

acceptance_criteria.then: Schema validates with no errors
Has required fields: userId, name, geometry (polyline), createdAt
Results returned efficiently
acceptance_criteria.verify: Check explain plan for userId index

acceptance_criteria.then: No data loss, clean migration

interaction_notes: No UI changes in this task
design.anti_pattern: Don't add unnecessary fields or complex relationships

tasks.assignment_rationale: Infrastructure task requiring Convex schema knowledge

tasks.title: Create favoriteRoads.ts with insert/list/delete

specification.objective: Create API layer for CRUD operations on favorite roads
specification.success_state: insert, listByOwner, and deleteById functions working with proper auth and validation

acceptance_criteria.when: Calling insert with name, geometry, and bounds
acceptance_criteria.then: Favorite road is created with userId, createdAt, updatedAt and returns favoriteRoadId

acceptance_criteria.given: User has created multiple favorite roads
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns only user's favorite roads ordered by createdAt desc
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test list returns only user's roads

acceptance_criteria.given: User has created a favorite road
acceptance_criteria.then: Road is deleted from database and returns null

acceptance_criteria.given: User attempts to delete another user's favorite road
acceptance_criteria.then: Operation throws ConvexError with 'not found' message
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test ownership check prevents unauthorized delete

acceptance_criteria.given: User attempts to insert with empty or >100 char name
acceptance_criteria.then: Insert throws ConvexError with validation message

write_prohibited: convex/schema.ts - schema changes require separate task
models/favorite-roads.ts - schema changes require separate task

design.anti_pattern: Don't skip ownership checks or validation

tasks.assignment_rationale: Backend Convex functions with CRUD operations requiring TDD

tasks.title: Add long-press handler to route polyline for segment selection

specification.objective: Enable users to long-press route segments to select them for saving
specification.success_state: Long-press on route polyline triggers callback with segment geometry, bounds, and coordinate

acceptance_criteria.given: Route is displayed on map with polylines
acceptance_criteria.when: User long-presses on a route segment
acceptance_criteria.then: onSegmentLongPress callback is triggered with segment geometry data
Callback includes coordinate, segment bounds, and segment geometry
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test callback includes all required data

acceptance_criteria.then: onSegmentLongPress callback is NOT triggered
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test threshold prevents tap from triggering

acceptance_criteria.then: onSegmentLongPress callback is triggered with base segment geometry

write_prohibited: lib/polyline.ts - utility functions, no changes needed

interaction_notes: Long-press is better than tap for segment selection
design.anti_pattern: Don't add gesture handler directly (use Polyline props)

tasks.assignment_rationale: UI component requiring TDD for interaction handling

tasks.title: Build 'Save as Favorite' action sheet

specification.objective: Provide UI for naming and saving selected road segments as favorites
specification.success_state: Action sheet with name input, save button, and cancel button appears after segment long-press

acceptance_criteria.then: Action sheet appears with 'Name this favorite' label, text input, Save and Cancel buttons
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test sheet displays with all elements

acceptance_criteria.given: Action sheet displayed with segment selected
acceptance_criteria.when: User enters name and taps Save
acceptance_criteria.then: saveFavoriteRoad mutation called, sheet dismisses, onSuccess callback triggered
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test save calls mutation and callbacks

acceptance_criteria.then: Action sheet dismisses, no mutation called, onCancel callback triggered

acceptance_criteria.given: Action sheet displayed with empty name
acceptance_criteria.when: User taps Save with empty input
acceptance_criteria.then: Save button is disabled, error message displayed
Input truncated at 100 characters, helper text shows character count

tasks.assignment_rationale: UI component requiring TDD for form handling and mutation calls

tasks.title: Build favorite-road-card.tsx with mini map

must: Use RouteThumbnail for mini map with bounds
strictly: Support onPress callback for card tap
Support onDelete callback for delete button

specification.objective: Create card component to display favorite road in list with visual preview
specification.success_state: Card displays favorite road name, mini map preview, and delete button

acceptance_criteria.then: Favorite road name displayed, mini map shows route geometry, uses semantic tokens
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test card displays name and mini map

acceptance_criteria.then: Mini map shows route within bounds using RouteThumbnail component
onDelete callback triggered with favoriteRoadId
onPress callback triggered with favoriteRoadId

tasks.assignment_rationale: UI component requiring TDD for card interactions

tasks.title: Build Favorite Roads settings section

must: Show EmptyState when list is empty

specification.objective: Create settings section to display and manage user's favorite roads
specification.success_state: Settings section displays list of favorite roads with empty state and delete confirmation

acceptance_criteria.then: All favorite roads displayed as cards, ordered newest first, each showing name and mini map

acceptance_criteria.given: User has no saved favorite roads
acceptance_criteria.then: Empty state shows 'No favorite roads yet' and 'Save a road segment to see it here'

acceptance_criteria.given: User taps delete on favorite road card
acceptance_criteria.then: Confirmation dialog appears with road name and Cancel/Delete buttons
deleteFavoriteRoad mutation called, road removed from list, list refreshes
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test delete removes favorite and refreshes

design.anti_pattern: Don't implement delete inline without confirmation

tasks.assignment_rationale: UI component requiring TDD for list management and mutations

tasks.title: Add 'Include favorite roads' toggle to plan-ride-sheet

must: Add toggle row in toggle section (after 'Avoid tolls')
strictly: Support disabled state when no favorites exist

specification.objective: Add toggle control to enable/disable favorite roads influence in route planning
specification.success_state: Toggle switch added to plan-ride-sheet to enable/disable favorites

acceptance_criteria.then: Include favorite roads toggle visible, positioned after Avoid tolls, uses Switch with heart icon
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test toggle displays in correct position

acceptance_criteria.then: onToggleIncludeFavorites callback triggered, toggle visually updates

acceptance_criteria.given: User has no saved favorite roads
acceptance_criteria.then: Toggle is disabled, helper text 'Save favorite roads first' displayed
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test toggle disabled when no favorites

tasks.assignment_rationale: UI component modification requiring TDD for toggle interaction

tasks.title: Pass favorites to planning graph as preferred segments

must: Add includeFavorites parameter to planRide action
Pass favorite geometries to planning graph
never: Force routes through favorites (should prefer, not require)

specification.objective: Integrate favorite roads into route planning to influence generated routes
specification.success_state: planRide action accepts favorites and passes them to planning graph, routes prefer favorites when feasible

acceptance_criteria.then: Action accepts includeFavorites boolean, fetches favorites when true, passes to graph
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test action accepts and passes favorites

acceptance_criteria.then: Graph receives favorite road geometries, uses as preferred segments, route generation considers favorites
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test graph receives and uses favorites

acceptance_criteria.then: Routes include favorite segments when feasible, prefer favorites over alternatives, quality remains acceptable
Planning proceeds normally, routes generated without favorites influence, no errors

acceptance_criteria.given: Favorite road is >50km from route corridor
acceptance_criteria.then: Favorite not included in routes, planning proceeds normally, other favorites considered

design.pattern: Modify graph to use favorites as preferred segments
design.anti_pattern: Don't force routes through favorites (quality still matters)

tasks.assignment_rationale: Backend action and graph modification requiring TDD for complex logic

tasks.title: Show favorite inclusion indicator on generated routes

must: Display badge when includedFavoritesCount > 0 or includeFavorites was true
strictly: Hide badge when includeFavorites was false

specification.objective: Display visual feedback showing which favorite roads influenced each generated route
specification.success_state: Route cards show indicators for which favorites are included in each route

acceptance_criteria.when: Route card displays and route includes favorites
acceptance_criteria.then: Card shows 'X favorites included' badge with heart icon near route stats
Badge displays '3 favorites included' using primary color
No favorites badge displayed, card layout unchanged
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test no badge when not included

acceptance_criteria.then: Badge displays '0 favorites included' using muted color
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test zero badge uses muted color

design.anti_pattern: Don't show favorite names in badge

tasks.assignment_rationale: UI component modification requiring TDD for badge display logic

tasks.title: Show 'couldn't include' message when favorite too far

strictly: Only show when includeFavorites was true

specification.objective: Display feedback message when favorite roads are too far from route to include
specification.success_state: Info message displays when favorites are too far from route

acceptance_criteria.then: Info banner displays below route options showing 'X favorite(s) too far from route' with info icon

acceptance_criteria.given: 2 favorites are too far from route
acceptance_criteria.then: Message displays '2 favorites too far from route', count is accurate

acceptance_criteria.given: All favorites are within route corridor
acceptance_criteria.then: No excluded favorites message displays, view layout unchanged
acceptance_criteria.verify: Test no message when all included

acceptance_criteria.then: No excluded favorites message displays, view layout unchanged

interaction_notes: Count only (names would be too long)
design.anti_pattern: Don't use warning variant (this isn't an error)

tasks.assignment_rationale: UI component modification requiring TDD for conditional banner display
